tasks.title: Identify IOCs in registration data (registrationevent, captchas, dim_member_all) that explain the inflated signups over the past 4-5 weeks while the reactive model was paused
Confirm whether the signup drop on 2026-04-07 from the model deployment is catching real abuse or blocking legit users
Attribute the EVERCAPTCHA spike and rule firing increases (autoretrained model HIGHLY_ABUSIVE, set_EVERCAPTCHA_from_quasar_reg_model) to specific attack patterns
Build investigation report with findings for stakeholders (Prachi, Jia, Dinesh, Zihua)
